ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "tripduration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (subscriber or customer) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the trip */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Actual route distance traveled in kilometers */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating of the trip (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_type FOREIGN KEY ("user_type") REFERENCES users ("user_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (available or in-use) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (subscriber or customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 for female, 1 for male) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "membership_start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started their membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "renewal_status" INTEGER /* Status of renewal (true if auto-renewed) */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (successful, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "parts_replaced" TEXT /* Parts replaced during maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips_by_month" (
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "trip_count" INTEGER /* Number of trips in the month */,
  "average_tripduration" REAL /* Average trip duration in the month */,
  "weather_data" TEXT /* Weather data for the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips_by_station" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "trip_count" INTEGER /* Number of trips from the station */,
  "average_tripduration" REAL /* Average trip duration from the station */,
  "peak_hours" TEXT /* Peak hours of usage at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (subscriber or customer) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Birth year of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (0 for female, 1 for male) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of users with the given demographics */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_type", "birth_year", "gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_performance" (
  "metric" TEXT /* System performance metric (e.g., response time, throughput) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component of the system the metric refers to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric", "date")
)
